oldIonosRecordsToRemoveOrReplace.value: old IONOS web-hosting target if present

recordsToKeep: api.fimamacro.com CNAME to fima-backend-aqmi.onrender.com unless intentionally changing API routing

dnsValuesRequiredFromRender.fimamacro.com: PLACEHOLDER: use exact Render Dashboard record type/value. Do not guess.
dnsValuesRequiredFromRender.www.fimamacro.com: PLACEHOLDER: use exact Render Dashboard record type/value. Do not guess.

blockerConditions: IONOS cannot create the Render-required apex/root record type.
Render domain verification does not pass after DNS propagation.
Render SSL certificate remains pending after domain verification.
A separate service or policy still owns fimamacro.com and blocks attaching it to fima-backend.
rollbackPlan: Restore fimamacro.com A record to 217.160.0.47 if needed.
Restore fimamacro.com AAAA record to 2001:8d8:100f:f000::200 if needed.
Restore old www IONOS web-hosting target if it was replaced.
Do not touch MX/SPF/DKIM/DMARC/email records during rollback.
manualStepsSummary: Render Dashboard -> fima-backend -> Settings -> Custom Domains -> add fimamacro.com and www.fimamacro.com.
Copy exact DNS record type/value Render shows for each domain.
Replace only root/www old IONOS web-hosting records with Render-required records.
Wait for DNS propagation, Render verification, and SSL provisioning.
nextRecommendedStep: Kaan should perform the manual Render custom-domain and IONOS DNS updates using the exact DNS values shown by Render, then request Priority 2K/2H rerun for live verification.
